steps.title: Clear the fraction
steps.content: Starting from $$b - 18 = \frac{x}{y},$$ multiply both sides by $y$ to eliminate the denominator: $$y(b - 18) = x.$$

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content:
• A ($x = \frac{by - 18}{y}$): only the $b$ term was multiplied by $y$, leaving an unsimplified fraction — not equivalent.
  • B ($x = by - 18$): forgets to multiply the $-18$ by $y$.
  • C ($x = by - 18y$): exactly matches the distributed form.
  • D ($x = \frac{b - 18}{y}$): divides by $y$ instead of multiplying.
That matches Choice C — $x = by - 18y$.
